source: Clipping Report (Apr 2026) + Clipping_Full_Context_V1 (Iyrah, May 2026) + Eclipse_V2.1 deck (Apr 2026) + Extended Network CPM Shortlist (Aya, Apr 2026)

hero.name: Eclipse
exclusions: No categories that erode brand permission
differentiators: A decade reading what actually clips
Brand-safe by default · vetted partner layer · FTC-safe

pricingTiers.name: Pubity Group Pages
pricingTiers.label: Ultimate trust + audience loyalty
pricingTiers.description: Premium placement on Pubity-owned pages. Where editorial fit is right, this is the highest-trust layer.

pricingTiers.name: Vetted Partners
pricingTiers.label: Trust + brand safety
pricingTiers.description: A curated set of partner pages that pass our brand-safety bar. Mid-tier for buyers who want quality at scale.

pricingTiers.name: Clipping Network
pricingTiers.label: Mass awareness
pricingTiers.description: Wider clipping layer — built for volume, velocity, and algorithmic momentum.

products.name: Eclipse — Entertainment Launch Buzz
products.what: Coordinated launch moment across three layers (Pubity → vetted partners → clipping network) for movies, TV series, gaming, music. "The launch is the product."
products.buyer: Film studios · streamers · game publishers · music labels
products.model: $13 / $10 / $6 CPM by layer · blended campaign package
products.currentState: Deck V2.1 live · no paying client test yet
products.targetState: Productised entertainment SKU · first paid Lead-led launch campaign as anchor case study

products.name: Buzz Upsell
products.what: Clipping bolted onto existing Pubity brand deals as a premium add-on — the "extra buzz above the memes."
products.currentState: Not productised · sales team not yet trained
products.targetState: Live SKU the brand partnerships team attaches to every entertainment-adjacent deal

products.name: Creator Growth Engine
products.what: Same supply chain pointed at smaller Pubity creators — clipping their best moments to grow audience and unlock monetisation.
products.buyer: Internal — Pubity's own creator roster inside Pillar 2
products.model: Service fee · bundled into Creators deals
products.targetState: Productised inside Creators Pillar 2 · one supply chain, two demand-side products

products.name: Lead Network
products.what: ~500 of the biggest and best accounts on the internet — the strategic asset brands actually care about. The moat.
products.currentState: Ad hoc relationships in extended network · 20 accounts shortlisted (Aya, ~130M combined followers, all Telegram-contactable)
products.targetState: ~500 accounts on retainer or per-campaign premium CPM

products.name: Micro Network
products.what: Open community of ~50,000 clippers — the Discord-economy layer. Lower CPM, mass volume, gives launches the depth and ubiquity that makes them feel everywhere.
products.currentState: Doesn't exist as Pubity-owned · clipper Discord + Pubity-only Discord running
products.targetState: ~50,000-strong open community on per-clip CPM · first 5,000 active clippers inside 90 days

products.name: Clipper Suite
products.what: Platform that runs both Lead + Micro tiers. Discord-first MVP evolving into a Pubity-built clipper app — clippers manage briefs, see live campaigns, access tier-gated private campaigns.
products.currentState: None · operating via partner platforms (Clipster, ViralGrowth)

lifecycle.label: Brief
lifecycle.detail: Client provides asset, target views, budget, launch window. Pubity confirms scope + recommended layer mix.

lifecycle.label: Position
lifecycle.detail: Vetted partners + clipping network choose how to position clips. Pubity provides examples / raw footage.

lifecycle.label: Distribute
lifecycle.detail: Coordinated posting across Pubity pages, vetted partners, and clipping network. Platform-native formatting per page.

lifecycle.label: Report
lifecycle.detail: Live dashboard: views, engagement, CPM. Final wrap delivered after campaign window closes.

leadNetworkSeed.source: Aya · Extended Network CPM Outreach Shortlist · April 2026
leadNetworkSeed.note: Top 20 accounts by format and reach — all have confirmed pricing and contact. CPM cols filled on response.

partners.name: Fixated
partners.focus: Premium brand work (EA, PrizePicks, Fanatics, GoPuff, music labels)
partners.cpm: $3–$4 typical · up to ~$10 on niche briefs
partners.offer: Direct partnership with Pubity · dedicated campaign manager · higher-CPM campaigns routed to Pubity pages (not open Discord). Flagged Pubity's static carousels as a distinct differentiator.
partners.outlook: Streaming/Twitch bearish — discoverability poor, top creators monopolise spend. Reinforces entertainment-launch wedge.
partners.nextStep: Decide: structured partnership in parallel to own build · could be fastest path to non-TEO case study

partners.name: Clipping Culture
partners.focus: Gaming-heavy · top-tier campaigns in flight (top global game)
partners.offer: Plug Pubity in as a partner. White-label service for Pubity clients. WhatsApp group with their team + notification of incoming top-tier gaming campaigns.
partners.status: active partnership · Mehz on WAP platform
partners.nextStep: Trial inbound brief via this channel

partners.name: Vyro
partners.offer: Pitch framework is reusable: target view-driven KPI owner (Marketing Director, Social Director); two-path pitch (differentiators vs. their problem).
partners.history: Underdelivered on Nov 2024 Simpsons x Fortnite campaign (3.18M views vs 10M goal). Factor into any future commitments.
partners.nextStep: Use pitch framework · approach with caution on delivery commitments

partners.name: Clip Money
partners.focus: Music + film + creator campaigns (Warner Music, Fear Factor/FOX, MrBeast, Zootopia 2, NASCAR)
partners.offer: Burns budget fast — positive signal for delivery capability
partners.nextStep: Benchmark · not currently in partnership conversation

partners.name: Promote.fun
partners.focus: Music + brand (Central Cee, Dua Lipa, Polymarket, Jared Leto, Manscaped)
partners.offer: Benchmark only · not in partnership conversation

cpmBenchmarks.source: Promote.fun Central Cee $0.044 · Clip Money Warner Music $0.095
Promote Jared Leto $0.62 · Clip Money Zootopia 2 $0.78

openQuestions.q: Is Eclipse the locked name? V1 strategy still references 'Culture Club / Trend Club TBC' — internal/external mismatch.

Eclipse charges $13/$10/$6 CPM. Industry benchmarks deliver at $0.09–$0.78. Either high-margin productised resell or delivery vs. invoice CPM distinction — needs spelling out before deal-room scrutiny.
Aya's 20-account seed is General News/Meme — not entertainment-vertical. For Eclipse to deliver on entertainment positioning, parallel pass needed for entertainment-fit accounts.
Take Reed's partnership offer ($3–4 CPM premium routed to Pubity pages, dedicated CM, carousel differentiator)? Fastest path to non-TEO case study.
Does the clipping owner sit in Innovation, Content, or Commercial — and what budget envelope for the team beneath?
Pre-approve a second pot for TEO phase-two bespoke campaign so there's no gap between phases one and two.
